ddl.name: GenerationJob
ddl.sql:
CREATE TABLE "GenerationJob" (
    "id"                  TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    "brief"               TEXT NOT NULL,
    "current_stage"       TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'BRIEF',
    "status"              TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING',
    "bundles_target"      INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "bundles_generated"   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "bundles_approved"    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "bundles_published"   INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "bundles_error"       INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "openai_tokens_used"  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "perplexity_queries"  INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "images_generated"    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "cost_cents"          INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    "user_id"             TEXT,
    "notes"               TEXT,
    "created_at"          DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    "updated_at"          DATETIME NOT NULL,
    "completed_at"        DATETIME
  )

ddl.name: BundleDraft
ddl.sql:
CREATE TABLE "BundleDraft" (
    "id"                          TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    "generation_job_id"           TEXT NOT NULL,
    "draft_name"                  TEXT NOT NULL,
    "brand"                       TEXT NOT NULL,
    "category"                    TEXT NOT NULL,
    "composition_type"            TEXT NOT NULL,
    "pack_count"                  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "draft_components"            TEXT NOT NULL,
    "draft_title"                 TEXT,
    "draft_bullets"               TEXT,
    "draft_description"           TEXT,
    "draft_search_terms"          TEXT,
    "draft_main_image_url"        TEXT,
    "draft_secondary_images"      TEXT,
    "draft_cost_cents"            INTEGER,
    "draft_suggested_price_cents" INTEGER,
    "status"                      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'VARIATION_SELECTED',
    "approval_notes"              TEXT,
    "target_channels"             TEXT NOT NULL,
    "master_bundle_id"            TEXT,
    "created_at"                  DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    "updated_at"                  DATETIME NOT NULL, "compliance_status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', "compliance_check_id" TEXT, "compliance_blocked_at" DATETIME, "compliance_blocked_reasons" TEXT, "image_generated_at" DATETIME,
    CONSTRAINT "BundleDraft_generation_job_id_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("generation_job_id") REFERENCES "GenerationJob" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE
  )

ddl.name: MasterBundle
ddl.sql:
CREATE TABLE "MasterBundle" (
    "id"                    TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    "name"                  TEXT NOT NULL,
    "internal_slug"         TEXT NOT NULL,
    "brand"                 TEXT NOT NULL,
    "category"              TEXT NOT NULL,
    "composition_type"      TEXT NOT NULL,
    "pack_count"            INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "total_weight_oz"       REAL,
    "total_weight_lb"       REAL,
    "cost_breakdown"        TEXT NOT NULL,
    "estimated_cost_cents"  INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "suggested_price_cents" INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "packaging_spec"        TEXT NOT NULL,
    "main_image_url"        TEXT NOT NULL,
    "secondary_images"      TEXT NOT NULL,
    "image_generation_meta" TEXT,
    "lifecycle_status"      TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
    "generation_job_id"     TEXT,
    "research_pool_seed_id" TEXT,
    "created_at"            DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    "updated_at"            DATETIME NOT NULL,
    "created_by_user_id"    TEXT,
    CONSTRAINT "MasterBundle_generation_job_id_fkey"     FOREIGN KEY ("generation_job_id")     REFERENCES "GenerationJob" ("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT "MasterBundle_research_pool_seed_id_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("research_pool_seed_id") REFERENCES "ResearchPool" ("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
  )

ddl.name: ChannelSKU
ddl.sql:
CREATE TABLE "ChannelSKU" (
    "id"                   TEXT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
    "master_bundle_id"     TEXT NOT NULL,
    "channel"              TEXT NOT NULL,
    "brand_account_id"     TEXT,
    "sku"                  TEXT NOT NULL,
    "upc"                  TEXT NOT NULL,
    "upc_pool_id"          TEXT,
    "asin"                 TEXT,
    "walmart_item_id"      TEXT,
    "ebay_item_id"         TEXT,
    "tiktok_product_id"    TEXT,
    "title"                TEXT NOT NULL,
    "bullets"              TEXT NOT NULL,
    "description"          TEXT NOT NULL,
    "search_terms"         TEXT,
    "attributes"           TEXT NOT NULL,
    "channel_category"     TEXT,
    "channel_browse_node"  TEXT,
    "price_cents"          INTEGER NOT NULL,
    "business_price_cents" INTEGER,
    "lifecycle_status"     TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
    "submitted_at"         DATETIME,
    "processing_at"        DATETIME,
    "live_at"              DATETIME,
    "live_url"             TEXT,
    "last_error_at"        DATETIME,
    "errors"               TEXT,
    "units_sold_30d"       INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    "revenue_30d_cents"    INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
    "created_at"           DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
    "updated_at"           DATETIME NOT NULL, "compliance_status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', "compliance_check_id" TEXT, "compliance_blocked_at" DATETIME, "compliance_blocked_reasons" TEXT, "main_image_url" TEXT, "validation_status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', "validation_errors" TEXT, "validated_at" DATETIME, "validation_check_id" TEXT, "validation_attempt_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "package_length_in" REAL, "package_width_in" REAL, "package_height_in" REAL, "package_weight_oz" REAL, "country_of_origin" TEXT DEFAULT 'US', "item_type" TEXT, "listing_status" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PENDING', "submission_id" TEXT, "published_at" DATETIME, "distribution_errors" TEXT, "distribution_attempt_count" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, "last_status_check_at" DATETIME,
    CONSTRAINT "ChannelSKU_master_bundle_id_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("master_bundle_id") REFERENCES "MasterBundle" ("id") ON DELETE CASCADE  ON UPDATE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT "ChannelSKU_brand_account_id_fkey" FOREIGN KEY ("brand_account_id") REFERENCES "BrandAccount" ("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE,
    CONSTRAINT "ChannelSKU_upc_pool_id_fkey"      FOREIGN KEY ("upc_pool_id")      REFERENCES "UPCPool"      ("id") ON DELETE SET NULL ON UPDATE CASCADE
  )

rows.title: Salutem Vita – Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches, Frozen, 8 oz, Gift Set – Pack of 6
rows.bullets: ["Contains 6 packages of Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches, each package includes 4 sandwiches (8 oz total per package)","Made with whole wheat bread, creamy peanut butter, and sweet strawberry jam in a crustless sealed sandwich format for quick preparation","Store in the freezer upon arrival and keep frozen until ready to use","Each sandwich thaws in 30 to 60 minutes at room temperature or can be enjoyed slightly frozen for a firmer texture","Convenient for school lunches, after-school snacks, quick breakfasts, or on-the-go meals when time is limited","Individually wrapped sandwiches provide portion control and easy storage in lunch boxes or freezer compartments","Total net weight: 48 oz across 24 individual sandwiches; check packaging for allergen information and nutritional details","Arrives in Salutem Vita branded outer packaging marked as a gift set; suitable for households stocking frozen meal options","Curated and assembled by Salutem Solutions LLC as a gift basket."]
rows.description:
The Salutem Vita Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich Gift Set includes 6 packages of Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches. Each package contains 4 crustless sandwiches made with whole wheat bread, peanut butter, and strawberry jam, totaling 24 sandwiches and 48 oz of product.

These frozen sandwiches require no preparation beyond thawing. Remove from the freezer and allow 30 to 60 minutes at room temperature for full thawing, or enjoy partially frozen if preferred. The crustless design and individually wrapped format make them convenient for packed lunches, quick snacks, or breakfast options.

Keep the gift set frozen and store it in the freezer upon arrival. Upon arrival, transfer packages to your freezer for storage. Each sandwich is individually sealed to maintain freshness and provide easy portioning.

This bundle contains 24 total sandwiches across 6 retail packages, providing a multi-week supply for regular consumption. Refer to individual package labels for complete ingredient lists, allergen warnings, and nutritional information.

This gift basket is curated and assembled by Salutem Solutions LLC. The included items are packaged by their original manufacturers.

rows.title: Uncrustables Chocolate Flavored Hazelnut Spread Frozen Sandwich, 18 oz, 10 Count – Pack of 6
rows.bullets: ["Contains 6 boxes, each with 10 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches for a total of 60 sandwiches","Smooth chocolate flavored hazelnut spread filling in soft bread baked with no artificial preservatives","Convenient storage options: keep frozen for extended shelf life or refrigerate for up to 5 days with bread staying soft","Individually wrapped premade sandwiches ready for lunchboxes, after-school snacks, or quick meals","Made with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Each box contains 18 oz total weight with 10 sandwiches per box"]
rows.description:
This bulk pack contains 6 boxes of Uncrustables Chocolate Flavored Hazelnut Spread Frozen Sandwiches, providing 60 individually wrapped sandwiches total. Each sandwich features soft bread baked fresh in the USA paired with a smooth, creamy chocolate flavored hazelnut spread filling.

These frozen sandwiches offer flexible storage: keep them in the freezer for long-term storage or move them to the refrigerator where the bread stays soft for up to 5 days. Each box contains 10 sandwiches weighing 18 oz total, making them convenient for stocking pantries, break rooms, or busy households.

The sandwiches are made with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes. The crustless design and individual wrapping make them suitable for packed lunches, quick snacks, or on-the-go meals. Packaging may vary from images shown.

rows.title: Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread Sandwiches, 8oz/4ct - Pack of 6 (24 Sandwiches Total)
rows.bullets: ["Each pack contains four individually wrapped frozen peanut butter and blackberry spread sandwiches, packaged 8oz/4ct per box, with 6 boxes included for a total of 24 sandwiches","Sandwiches are made with soft bread with no artificial preservatives, filled with peanut butter and blackberry spread, and contain no high fructose corn syrup and no artificial colors or dyes","Store in the freezer for longer shelf life, or move to the refrigerator where bread stays soft for up to five days, making them ready to eat as a grab-and-go snack or lunch item","Individually wrapped format allows each sandwich to be packed separately for lunch boxes, bags, or coolers without needing extra wrapping or preparation","Blackberry Boom is a limited-time seasonal flavor combining peanut butter with sweet blackberry spread between two slices of soft bread"]
rows.description:
This listing includes 6 boxes of Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread Sandwiches, each box containing four individually wrapped sandwiches (8oz/4ct per box), for a total of 24 sandwiches.

Each sandwich is made with soft bread containing no artificial preservatives, filled with creamy peanut butter and sweet blackberry spread. The recipe contains no high fructose corn syrup and no artificial colors or dyes.

Sandwiches can be stored in the freezer for extended storage, or kept in the refrigerator where the bread remains soft for up to five days. This makes them suitable for packing into lunch boxes or bags without additional preparation.

Blackberry Boom is a seasonal flavor pairing peanut butter with blackberry spread. Each sandwich is individually wrapped, allowing them to be portioned out as needed from the freezer or refrigerator.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches, 30 Count, 2 oz Each, Frozen Multipack
rows.bullets: ["Contains 30 individually wrapped Uncrustables frozen sandwiches, each 2 oz, filled with peanut butter and strawberry jam","Bread is baked with no artificial preservatives and sealed crustless around the filling","Sandwiches are individually wrapped for packing in lunch boxes, bags, or eating on the go","Store in the freezer or refrigerate; bread stays soft in the fridge for up to five days","Made with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Packaging may vary"]
rows.description:
This multipack contains 30 individually wrapped Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches, each 2 oz and sold frozen for later use.

Each sandwich is made with soft bread baked without artificial preservatives, filled with peanut butter and strawberry jam, and sealed crustless around the edges. Sandwiches can be stored in the freezer or moved to the refrigerator, where the bread stays soft for up to five days, making them ready to eat when needed.

Individually wrapped for portioning into lunch boxes, bags, or for eating on the go. Made with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Ingredients (bread): enriched unbleached flour (wheat flour, malted barley flour, niacin, ferrous sulfate, thiamin mononitrate, riboflavin, folic acid), water, unbleached whole wheat flour, sugar, yeast, soybean oil, and 2% or less of salt and dough conditioner (enzymes, ascorbic acid, calcium peroxide). Peanut butter: peanuts, sugar, and 2% or less of molasses, fully hydrogenated vegetable oils (rapeseed and soybean), mono and diglycerides, salt. Strawberry jam: sugar, strawberries, and 2% or less of pectin, citric acid, potassium sorbate (preservative).

Packaging may vary.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches, Frozen, 2 oz Each, 45 Count Multipack
rows.bullets: ["Contains 45 individually wrapped Uncrustables frozen sandwiches, each 2 oz, filled with peanut butter and strawberry jam","Bread is baked with no artificial preservatives, no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Sandwiches are crustless and individually wrapped, making them easy to pack for lunches, snacks, or eating on the go","Store in the freezer for longer shelf life, or move to the refrigerator where bread stays soft for up to five days","Suited for school lunches, work breaks, or stocking a freezer or fridge with a ready-to-eat sandwich option","Packaging may vary"]
rows.description:
This multipack contains 45 individually wrapped Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam sandwiches, each weighing 2 oz. The sandwiches are frozen and crustless, made with soft bread and filled with creamy peanut butter and sweet strawberry jam.

Each sandwich can be stored in the freezer or moved to the refrigerator, where the bread stays soft for up to five days. This makes them a convenient option for packing lunches or snacks ahead of time, or for keeping on hand for quick mornings.

The bread is baked with no artificial preservatives. The recipe contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Each sandwich is individually wrapped for storage and portioning. Packaging may vary.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Frozen Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, 90 Count Multipack
rows.bullets: ["Contains 90 individually wrapped Uncrustables frozen sandwiches, each filled with peanut butter and strawberry jam, 2 oz per sandwich","Bread is baked with no artificial preservatives, and the filling has no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Individually wrapped format makes each sandwich easy to pack for lunches, snacks, or eating on the go","Store in the freezer for longer shelf life, or move to the refrigerator where the bread stays soft for up to five days","No crusts to cut, no assembly required; each sandwich is premade and ready to thaw and eat","Multipack of 90 units suits stocking a freezer for households, classrooms, or extended meal planning","Made with enriched flour, whole wheat flour, peanuts, and strawberries; full ingredient list included with packaging","Packaging may vary"]
rows.description:
This multipack contains 90 individually wrapped Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam sandwiches, 2 oz each, frozen for freshness.

Each sandwich is premade with no crusts, filled with peanut butter and strawberry jam between soft bread baked with no artificial preservatives. The filling contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Sandwiches can be stored in the freezer for extended shelf life or moved to the refrigerator, where the bread stays soft for up to five days. Individually wrapped packaging makes them convenient to pack for lunches, snacks, or on-the-go eating without additional preparation.

Ingredients include enriched unbleached flour, whole wheat flour, peanuts, sugar, and strawberries, along with other listed ingredients for bread, peanut butter, and jam components. Packaging may vary.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, Frozen, 30 Count
rows.bullets: ["Contains 30 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches, 2 oz each — sold as 30 single pieces, not as retail boxes or cases.","Each sandwich is filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth, seedless raspberry spread on soft, crustless bread baked fresh in the USA.","No high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, no artificial colors or dyes, and no artificial preservatives in the bread.","Store in the freezer and thaw as needed, or move to the refrigerator — bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated.","Individually wrapped for portability — no preparation required beyond thawing, suitable for lunchboxes and on-the-go eating."]
rows.description:
Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread Sandwiches, sold here as a pack of 30 individual frozen sandwiches, 2 oz each.

Each sandwich is made with soft, crustless bread baked fresh in the USA. The filling combines creamy peanut butter with smooth, seedless raspberry spread. The bread contains no artificial preservatives. These sandwiches contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Keep sandwiches in the freezer and thaw as needed. Sandwiches can also be stored in the refrigerator, where the bread stays soft for up to five days. Each sandwich is individually wrapped and requires no preparation beyond thawing.

rows.title: Uncrustables Chocolate Flavored Hazelnut Spread Frozen Sandwiches, 1.8 oz Each, 30 Count
rows.bullets: ["Pack contains 30 individually wrapped Uncrustables Chocolate Flavored Hazelnut Spread frozen sandwiches, each weighing 1.8 oz.","Each sandwich is filled with smooth, creamy chocolate flavored hazelnut spread on soft bread baked with no artificial preservatives.","Made with bread baked fresh in the USA; contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.","Can be stored in the freezer for extended shelf life, or refrigerated — bread stays soft for up to five days when kept in the fridge.","Individually wrapped and thaw-ready, with no preparation or cooking required; suited for lunchboxes, commutes, and quick snack breaks."]
rows.description:
This listing is for a pack of 30 individually wrapped Uncrustables Chocolate Flavored Hazelnut Spread frozen sandwiches. Each sandwich weighs 1.8 oz and is made with soft bread baked fresh in the USA, filled with smooth, creamy chocolate flavored hazelnut spread.

Store the sandwiches in the freezer for longer shelf life, or move them to the refrigerator — the bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated. No heating or preparation is required; simply thaw and eat.

These sandwiches contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes. Bread is baked with no artificial preservatives.

Each pack includes 30 pre-made frozen sandwiches, individually sealed for freshness and portability. Packaging may vary.

rows.title: Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, 30 Count
rows.bullets: ["Contains 30 individually wrapped Smucker's Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches, 2 oz each, for a total of 60 oz.","Made with soft, crustless bread filled with peanut butter and strawberry jam — no cooking or heating required.","Thaw at room temperature before serving. Keep frozen until ready to eat. Once thawed, do not refreeze.","Each sandwich is sealed in its own individual wrapper for single-serving portioning and ease of packing.","See individual sandwich packaging for complete ingredient lists, allergen information, and nutrition facts."]
rows.description:
Smucker's Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches come pre-made and frozen, ready to thaw and eat without any preparation. This listing contains 30 individual sandwiches, each 2 oz, for a total of 60 oz.

Each sandwich is made with soft, crustless bread filled with peanut butter and strawberry jam. The sandwiches are individually wrapped and sealed to maintain freshness until thawed.

Store frozen until ready to use. Thaw at room temperature before serving. Once thawed, do not refreeze. Refer to individual sandwich wrappers for complete nutrition information, allergen statements, and ingredient lists.

Smucker's Uncrustables are a product of The J.M. Smucker Company.

rows.bullets: ["45 individually wrapped Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches, each 2 oz, filled with creamy peanut butter and seedless raspberry spread on soft, crustless bread","Made with Unbeatably Soft Bread baked fresh in the USA — no artificial preservatives in the bread","No high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Store in the freezer for longer storage and thaw as needed, or refrigerate and eat within five days — bread stays soft in the fridge","Individually wrapped for easy packing and on-the-go eating — no prep required, just thaw and eat"]
rows.description:
Smucker's Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread Sandwiches come pre-made and frozen, ready to pack or eat whenever hunger strikes. This bulk pack contains 45 individually wrapped sandwiches, each 2 oz, making it straightforward to stock up for school lunches, work snacks, or quick meals throughout the week.

Each sandwich is filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth, seedless raspberry spread, sealed in soft, crustless bread baked fresh in the USA. The bread contains no artificial preservatives, and the filling contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Storage is flexible: keep sandwiches in the freezer for longer storage and thaw as needed, or transfer them to the refrigerator where the bread stays soft for up to five days. No heating required — just thaw and eat.

Packaging may vary.

rows.description:
Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread Sandwiches come 24 individually wrapped per order, each sandwich weighing 2 oz. Each is filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth, seedless raspberry spread on soft bread baked in the USA.

The bread contains no artificial preservatives. The filling contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Each sandwich is individually sealed with no crust. Suitable for school lunches, workplace snacks, and on-the-go eating where no preparation is needed.

rows.description:
This pack contains 24 individually wrapped Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Honey Spread frozen sandwiches, each weighing 2 oz.

Each sandwich is made with soft wheat bread baked fresh in the USA, filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth honey spread. The bread contains no artificial preservatives. The filling contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Storage is flexible. Keep sandwiches in the freezer for longer-term storage, or transfer to the refrigerator — the bread remains soft for up to five days when refrigerated. No preparation is required; thaw and eat.

The individually wrapped format makes these sandwiches straightforward to pack for school lunches, work, travel, or any situation where a portable, no-preparation sandwich is useful.

rows.description:
Uncrustables Peanut Butter Sandwiches are premade, crustless frozen sandwiches that thaw without any preparation. Each sandwich is individually wrapped and sealed, ready to eat once thawed. This pack contains 24 sandwiches total.

The bread is soft and crustless, baked fresh in the USA without artificial preservatives. The filling is creamy peanut butter with no jelly. Each sandwich is individually wrapped, which makes packing straightforward — into a lunchbox, backpack, or bag. No utensils, no cutting, no cleanup needed.

rows.bullets: ["24 individually wrapped frozen crustless sandwiches, each 2 oz, filled with creamy peanut butter and a smooth chocolate flavored spread on soft crustless bread","No preparation required — thaw in the refrigerator for up to five days or keep in the freezer and thaw as needed before eating","No high fructose corn syrup and no artificial colors or dyes; bread contains no artificial preservatives","Crustless bread is baked in the USA from enriched unbleached flour and unbleached whole wheat flour","Individually wrapped portions make it straightforward to grab one at a time for school lunches, after-school snacks, or on-the-go eating"]
rows.description:
This pack contains 24 individually wrapped Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread Sandwiches, each 2 oz, sold frozen.

Each sandwich fills soft crustless bread with creamy peanut butter and a smooth chocolate flavored spread. The bread is baked in the USA from enriched unbleached flour and unbleached whole wheat flour with no artificial preservatives. The filling contains no high fructose corn syrup and no artificial colors or dyes.

Storage is flexible: keep sandwiches in the freezer until needed, or transfer to the refrigerator where the bread stays soft for up to five days. No cooking or other preparation is required.

Ingredients — Bread: Enriched Unbleached Flour (Wheat Flour, Malted Barley Flour, Niacin, Ferrous Sulfate, Thiamin Mononitrate, Riboflavin, Folic Acid), Water, Unbleached Whole Wheat Flour, Sugar, Yeast, Soybean Oil, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Salt, Dough Conditioner (Enzymes, Ascorbic Acid, Calcium Peroxide). Peanut Butter: Peanuts, Sugar, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Molasses, Fully Hydrogenated Vegetable Oils (Rapeseed And Soybean), Mono And Diglycerides, Salt. Chocolate Flavored Spread: Corn Syrup, Sugar, Water, Cocoa Processed With Alkali, Contains 2% Or Less Of: Pectin, Potassium Sorbate (Preservative), Calcium Chloride, Artificial Flavor.

See nutrition information for fat and saturated fat content.","Filled with creamy peanut butter and sweet strawberry jam on soft, crustless whole-grain bread baked fresh in the USA.","Made with peanut butter as the first ingredient, whole grains, no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors.","Store in the freezer and thaw before eating, or refrigerate thawed sandwiches for up to five days."]
rows.description:
Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam sandwiches are a no-prep frozen option for busy mornings, school lunches, or quick snacks at any time of day.

Each sandwich is crustless and individually wrapped, with a filling of creamy peanut butter and sweet strawberry jam on soft whole-grain bread baked fresh in the USA. No cooking is required — remove from the freezer, allow to thaw, and eat. Once thawed, sandwiches can be refrigerated for up to five days.

This listing contains 30 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches, each weighing 2.8 oz. Each sandwich provides 12g of protein per serving. See nutrition information for fat and saturated fat content.

Made with peanut butter as the first ingredient. Contains whole grains. No high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors.

rows.description:
This bulk pack contains 30 individually wrapped Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Honey Spread Sandwiches — the same crustless, premade sandwiches sold in stores, now in a larger quantity for households, school lunches, or office snacking.

Each sandwich is made with soft wheat bread and filled with creamy peanut butter and sweet honey spread. The bread is baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives. The recipe contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Storage is flexible: keep sandwiches in the freezer for long-term storage, or transfer to the refrigerator — bread stays soft in the fridge for up to five days. No preparation needed beyond thawing.

Each sandwich is individually sealed for easy portioning. 30 sandwiches total.

rows.bullets: ["Whole wheat bread filled with creamy peanut butter and strawberry jam spread, baked without artificial preservatives.","Reduced sugar formula with 25% less total sugar than the regular variety — 7g total sugar per serving, made without artificial sweeteners, no high fructose corn syrup, and no artificial colors or dyes.","Each sandwich is individually wrapped and sealed crustless, with no preparation required before thawing.","Store in the freezer for extended freshness or refrigerate for up to five days — bread stays soft when kept in the refrigerator.","30-count bulk pack of individually wrapped 2 oz frozen sandwiches for school lunches, office snacks, and household meal planning."]
rows.description:
Uncrustables Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches come in a 30-count bulk pack, each sandwich individually wrapped and frozen for simple storage and quick access. Made with soft whole wheat bread sealed around a filling of creamy peanut butter and smooth strawberry jam spread, with no artificial preservatives in the bread.

This is the reduced sugar variety, with 25% less total sugar than the regular 2 oz Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich — 7g total sugar per serving versus 10g in the standard variety. No artificial sweeteners, no high fructose corn syrup, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Each sandwich is pre-sealed and crustless, ready to eat after thawing. Store the pack in the freezer and pull individual sandwiches as needed, or transfer them to the refrigerator — bread stays soft in the fridge for up to five days. Thaw at room temperature before serving.

30 individually wrapped 2 oz frozen sandwiches per pack. Bread baked in the USA.

rows.description:
Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter Sandwiches come ready to thaw and eat — no prep, no crust, no cleanup. This listing contains 30 individually wrapped sandwiches, each 1.8 oz, well-suited for packed lunches, school snacks, or on-the-go eating.

Each sandwich is filled with creamy peanut butter and enclosed in soft, crustless bread baked fresh in the USA. This peanut butter variety contains 30% more peanut butter than the standard 2 oz Peanut Butter and Grape Jelly Uncrustables sandwich. The bread contains no artificial preservatives, no high fructose corn syrup, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Storage is flexible: keep sandwiches in the freezer until needed, then thaw at room temperature. Or transfer sandwiches to the refrigerator — bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated, so they are ready to grab without any wait.

Each sandwich is individually wrapped for easy portioning and packing. The 30-count format reduces restocking frequency for households, offices, or any setting where a quick sandwich option is regularly on hand.

rows.description:
This bulk pack contains 30 individually wrapped Smucker's Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread frozen sandwiches, each weighing 2 oz. Each sandwich is filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth blackberry spread on crustless bread baked fresh in the USA.

No preparation is required. Move sandwiches from the freezer to the refrigerator to thaw — the bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated, and each sandwich is ready to eat straight from the wrapper once thawed. Sandwiches can also be kept frozen and thawed individually as needed.

Blackberry Boom is a limited-time seasonal flavor. The 30-count format provides a sufficient supply for household use, lunchbox rotation, or shared settings.

rows.title: Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, 30 Count
rows.bullets: ["Contains 30 individually sealed Smucker's Uncrustables Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly Sandwiches, each 2 oz, ready to thaw and eat","Made on whole wheat bread with peanut butter and grape jelly filling — edges are sealed and crust is removed for a self-contained, handheld sandwich format","No cooking or heating required — thaw at room temperature for 30 to 60 minutes before serving","Each sandwich is individually wrapped, making it easy to pack one at a time into a lunchbox or bag without opening a larger quantity at once","Keep frozen until ready to use — once thawed, consume within 8 hours and do not refreeze; store in the freezer for up to 1 year from purchase"]
rows.description:
This pack contains 30 Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly Sandwiches, each individually sealed and ready to thaw and eat.

Each sandwich is made on whole wheat bread with peanut butter and grape jelly filling. The edges are sealed and the crust is removed, producing a contained, handheld sandwich that requires no assembly or utensils.

No cooking or heating is required. To serve, thaw at room temperature for 30 to 60 minutes. Once thawed, sandwiches should be consumed within 8 hours and should not be refrozen.

Each sandwich comes individually wrapped, making it straightforward to portion one at a time. The 30-count format is suited for household stock-up or preparing multiple lunches in advance.

Store all sandwiches in the freezer until ready to use.

rows.description:
Smucker's Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Blueberry Sandwiches are sold here as 30 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches. Each piece weighs 2.8 oz and consists of crustless soft bread sealed around a peanut butter and blueberry filling.

To serve, thaw at room temperature for 30 to 60 minutes. Do not microwave. Once thawed, consume within 8 to 10 hours and do not refreeze. Keep frozen at 0 degrees F or below until ready to use.

The individual wrapping keeps each sandwich contained and clean, making them straightforward to portion out for school lunches, work snacks, or travel. No preparation beyond thawing is required.

rows.title: Smucker's Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter and Grape Jelly Sandwich, 2 oz Each, 30 Count
rows.bullets: ["Crustless peanut butter and grape jelly sandwiches — each piece is individually sealed and frozen for freshness","Each sandwich is 2 oz, made on a soft round bread with crusts removed and edges sealed, containing Smucker's peanut butter and grape jelly filling","Thaw at room temperature for 30 to 60 minutes before serving; refrigerate any unused thawed sandwiches and consume within 24 hours","Pack of 30 individually sealed sandwiches — suitable for school lunches, after-school snacks, work meals, or general freezer stocking","No preparation required beyond thawing — sandwiches are pre-made and sealed, with no cutting or assembly needed"]
rows.description:
Smucker's Uncrustables are frozen peanut butter and grape jelly sandwiches on soft, crustless bread rounds. Each sandwich is individually sealed and arrives frozen, requiring only thawing before eating.

This listing includes 30 sandwiches, each weighing 2 oz. The filling combines Smucker's peanut butter and grape jelly inside a sealed, crustless bread round.

To serve: remove from the freezer and thaw at room temperature for approximately 30 to 60 minutes. Once thawed, refrigerate any uneaten sandwiches and consume within 24 hours. Do not refreeze after thawing. Do not microwave.

Store flat in the freezer until ready to use. Suitable for school lunches, office snacks, or any situation where a pre-made, no-prep sandwich is needed.

rows.description:
Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches are sold here as 45 individually wrapped pieces, each weighing 2.8 oz.

Each crustless sandwich is made with whole grain bread baked fresh in the USA and filled with peanut butter — listed as the first ingredient — and strawberry jam. Each sandwich delivers 12g of protein per serving. See nutrition information for fat and saturated fat content.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Honey Spread Frozen Sandwiches, Individually Wrapped, 90 Count
rows.bullets: ["Contains 90 individually wrapped Uncrustables frozen sandwiches — soft wheat bread filled with creamy peanut butter and sweet honey spread, ready to thaw and eat with no preparation needed.","Made with soft wheat bread baked fresh in the USA and packed with creamy peanut butter and smooth honey spread — no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.","Fridge or freezer storage — keep in the freezer for extended shelf life or transfer to the refrigerator where the bread stays soft for up to five days, thawed and ready to eat.","Individually wrapped portions pack easily into lunchboxes, bags, or coolers for school, work, sports, or on-the-go use without any mess or assembly.","No crusts, no cooking, no prep required — each sandwich arrives sealed and crustless, ready to eat once thawed, suited for households, offices, or any high-volume snack setting."]
rows.description:
Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Honey Spread Frozen Sandwiches arrive in a bulk pack of 90 individually wrapped portions. Each sandwich is made with soft wheat bread baked fresh in the USA, filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth honey spread, and sealed crustless.

No high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, no artificial colors or dyes, and no artificial preservatives in the bread. The ingredient list stays straightforward.

Storage is flexible: keep sandwiches in the freezer for longer-term storage, or move them to the refrigerator where the bread stays soft for up to five days. Once thawed, each portion is ready to eat — no heating, no assembly.

This 90-count pack fits households stocking up for the week, offices supplying a break room, school programs, or any setting that calls for a portable, ready-to-eat sandwich in volume. Each piece is individually wrapped for grab-and-go use.

rows.title: Uncrustables Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich, Reduced Sugar, Individually Wrapped, Frozen, 90 Count
rows.bullets: ["Contains 90 individually wrapped frozen whole wheat peanut butter and strawberry jam sandwiches — convenient for stocking school lunches, work bags, or quick snacks on the go","Made with soft whole wheat bread, creamy peanut butter, and strawberry spread — no artificial preservatives, no artificial colors or dyes, and no high fructose corn syrup","Reduced sugar formula with 25% less total sugar than the regular 2.0 oz Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich — 7g total sugar per serving, down from 10g, with no artificial sweeteners added","Flexible storage: keep in the freezer for extended shelf life or refrigerate for up to five days — refrigerated sandwiches stay soft and are thawed and ready to eat without any wait time","Bread baked fresh in the USA — each sandwich comes pre-made and sealed with no crust, so there is no prep work required before serving"]
rows.description:
Smucker's Uncrustables Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches come pre-made and individually wrapped, making them straightforward to grab for school lunches, after-school snacks, or quick breakfasts. This pack contains 90 frozen sandwiches.

Each sandwich is made with soft whole wheat bread, creamy peanut butter, and strawberry spread. The bread is baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives, no artificial colors, no artificial dyes, and no high fructose corn syrup.

This is the reduced sugar variety — 25% less total sugar than the regular 2.0 oz Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich. Total sugar is 7g per serving, down from 10g, with no artificial sweeteners added.

Store in the freezer for extended shelf life. These sandwiches can also be refrigerated — kept in the fridge, the bread stays soft for up to five days, so they are thawed and ready to eat without any advance planning.

rows.bullets: ["Contains 45 individually wrapped Uncrustables Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches, sold as individual pieces ready to thaw and eat straight from the pack.","Made with soft whole wheat bread, creamy peanut butter, and smooth strawberry spread — no crusts and no cooking or assembly required.","Reduced sugar formula with 7 g of total sugar per serving — 25% less total sugar than the standard 2.0 oz Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich, with no artificial sweeteners and no high fructose corn syrup.","Bread baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives, no artificial colors, and no artificial dyes.","Freezer-stable for long-term storage; once thawed, refrigerate and the bread stays soft for up to five days — thaw at room temperature for 30 to 60 minutes before eating."]
rows.description:
Uncrustables Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches come in a bulk 45-count pack, with each sandwich individually wrapped for grab-and-go use. Made with soft whole wheat bread, creamy peanut butter, and smooth strawberry spread, these sandwiches contain no crusts and require no cooking or assembly.

Each sandwich is made with a reduced sugar formula — 7 g of total sugar per serving, which is 25% less than the standard 2.0 oz Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich. The recipe contains no artificial sweeteners, no high fructose corn syrup, and no artificial colors or dyes. Bread is baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives.

Store in the freezer for long-term use. To thaw, leave at room temperature for 30 to 60 minutes before serving. Alternatively, refrigerate for up to five days — the bread stays soft in the refrigerator so sandwiches are ready to eat when needed.

This 45-count pack suits households, offices, school cafeterias, or any setting that calls for a consistent supply of individually portioned, crust-free sandwiches.

rows.title: Uncrustables Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Frozen Sandwich, 2 oz, Reduced Sugar, 90 Count
rows.bullets: ["90 individually wrapped, crustless 2 oz frozen sandwiches — each filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth strawberry spread on soft whole wheat bread","Reduced sugar variety: 7 g total sugar per serving, down 25% from the 10 g in the regular 2.0 oz Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich — no artificial sweeteners used","No artificial preservatives in the bread, no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial colors, and no artificial dyes","Freezer or refrigerator storage — transfer to the fridge and bread stays soft for up to five days; keep in the freezer for longer-term storage and thaw when ready","Bread baked fresh in the USA — thaw at room temperature or refrigerate overnight; no cooking or assembly required"]
rows.description:
Uncrustables Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Frozen Sandwiches — 90 individually wrapped, crustless 2 oz sandwiches, ready to thaw and eat with no preparation required.

Each sandwich is made with soft whole wheat bread filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth strawberry spread. The bread is baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives. The filling contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, no artificial colors, and no artificial dyes.

This is the Reduced Sugar variety. Total sugar content is 7 g per serving, reduced 25% from the 10 g found in the regular 2.0 oz Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwich. No artificial sweeteners are used in the reduction.

Storage is flexible. Keep sandwiches in the freezer for long-term storage or move them to the refrigerator — bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated. Thaw at room temperature or overnight in the fridge before eating.

Packaging may vary.

(See nutrition information for total fat and saturated fat content.)","No cooking or preparation required. Remove from the freezer to thaw, or refrigerate for up to five days before eating. rows.description:
Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Sandwiches are crustless frozen sandwiches made with whole grain wheat bread, peanut butter, and strawberry jam. This listing contains 120 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches, each weighing 2.8 oz, with 12g of protein per serving.

Each sandwich requires no cooking or assembly. Take a sandwich out of the freezer and let it thaw, or move it to the refrigerator — sandwiches keep for up to five days when refrigerated. No prep work is required.

The bread is baked fresh in the USA. Ingredients include peanut butter as the first ingredient, whole grain wheat bread, and strawberry jam. No high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors.

This bulk quantity of 120 individual sandwiches is suited for households that go through Uncrustables regularly, school or office settings where multiple people need a quick no-prep option, or any situation requiring a consistent frozen sandwich supply. All 120 sandwiches are the same Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam with 12g Protein variety, each individually wrapped and sold as individual pieces — not as retail boxes or multi-packs.

See nutrition information for total fat and saturated fat content.

rows.description:
Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread Sandwiches come pre-made, individually wrapped, and frozen. This listing contains 120 sandwiches, each weighing 2 oz.

Each sandwich is made with soft, crustless bread baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives, filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth, seedless raspberry spread. Contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Sandwiches can be kept in the freezer and thawed individually as needed. Moved to the refrigerator, the bread stays soft for up to five days.

Bread ingredients include enriched unbleached flour, unbleached whole wheat flour, water, sugar, yeast, and soybean oil. Peanut butter filling contains peanuts and sugar. Raspberry spread contains sugar, raspberries, water, fruit pectin, and natural flavors.

Packaging may vary.

rows.description:
This listing contains 120 individually wrapped Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread Sandwiches, each 2 oz, shipped and sold frozen.

Each sandwich pairs creamy peanut butter with a smooth chocolate flavored spread, sealed inside soft, crustless bread. The bread is baked fresh in the USA with no high fructose corn syrup and no artificial colors or dyes. The crustless format means no trimming and no prep work before eating.

To serve, thaw at room temperature. Sandwiches can also be refrigerated — once in the refrigerator, the bread stays soft for up to five days. For longer storage, keep in the freezer and thaw individual pieces as needed.

All 120 sandwiches come individually wrapped, making it straightforward to take one at a time and return the rest to the freezer.

rows.description:
This 24-count pack brings together two Uncrustables varieties: Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Protein sandwiches and Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches, all in crustless, individually wrapped frozen sandwich format.

Each sandwich requires no preparation. Take them out of the freezer to thaw at room temperature, or store in the refrigerator for up to five days. No cooking, no utensils, no cleanup.

The Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Protein variety contains 12g of protein per serving. Both varieties are made with whole grains and peanut butter as the first ingredient, with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors. The soft, crustless bread is baked fresh in the USA and sealed at the edges.

Pack contents: 12 Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam Protein sandwiches (2.8 oz each) and 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches, 24 individually wrapped sandwiches total.

Both varieties feature crustless, soft bread baked in the USA, sealed around the filling with no loose edges. To serve, remove from the freezer and allow to thaw, or keep refrigerated for up to five days. No heating or cooking required.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter & Honey Spread Frozen Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, 24 Count
rows.bullets: ["24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches in a single pack — 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread, each 2 oz","Soft, crustless bread baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives — sealed edges hold the filling in place and keep the bread tender from frozen storage through thaw","Each sandwich is filled with creamy peanut butter paired with either seedless raspberry spread or honey spread — no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Store in the freezer for long-term keeping or refrigerate for up to five days — bread stays soft in the refrigerator so sandwiches are thawed and ready to eat without waiting","Individually wrapped for grab-and-go use — suited for packed lunches, after-school snacks, and quick meals that require no preparation"]
rows.description:
This 24-count pack includes two varieties of Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches and 12 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread sandwiches. Each sandwich weighs 2 oz and is individually wrapped.

The bread is baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives. Crustless sealed edges hold the filling in place and maintain consistent texture from frozen storage through thawing. Stored in the refrigerator, the bread stays soft for up to five days.

The Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches pair creamy peanut butter with a smooth, seedless raspberry spread. The Peanut Butter & Honey Spread sandwiches pair creamy peanut butter with honey spread. Both varieties contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

To serve, thaw at room temperature or refrigerate overnight before eating. No cooking required. The individual wrapping makes it straightforward to take one sandwich at a time for lunches, snacks, or on-the-go eating.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter Sandwich Variety Pack, 2 oz Each, 24 Count - Raspberry Spread and Whole Wheat Strawberry Jam
rows.bullets: ["Pack includes 24 individually wrapped frozen Uncrustables sandwiches — 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam, each weighing 2 oz.","Each variety features creamy peanut butter filling — paired with seedless raspberry spread on soft white bread, or with strawberry jam on soft whole wheat bread — sealed in crustless rounds.","Bread baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives; sandwiches contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.","Store in the freezer; thaw in the refrigerator when needed — bread stays soft in the fridge for up to five days. No heating required.","Each sandwich is individually wrapped and ready to eat after thawing — suitable for lunchboxes, travel, or quick on-the-go eating."]
rows.description:
This pack contains 24 individually wrapped Uncrustables frozen sandwiches in two flavors: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread on soft white bread, and 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam on soft whole wheat bread. Each sandwich weighs 2 oz.

The Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches are filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth, seedless raspberry spread, sealed inside soft crustless rounds. The Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam sandwiches pair the same creamy peanut butter with strawberry jam on soft whole wheat crustless bread.

Both varieties are baked fresh in the USA. The bread contains no artificial preservatives. These sandwiches contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Keep the sandwiches in the freezer for storage. Move to the refrigerator to thaw — the bread stays soft in the fridge for up to five days. No heating required. Each piece is individually wrapped and ready to eat once thawed.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter Frozen Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, Variety Pack, 24 Count
rows.bullets: ["Pack of 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches — 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter, 2 oz each","Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches are filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth, seedless raspberry spread on soft bread","Peanut Butter sandwiches feature creamy peanut butter on soft bread with no added spread — straightforward and simple","Bread is baked with no artificial preservatives; sandwiches contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Store in the freezer for longer shelf life or refrigerate for up to five days — bread stays soft in the refrigerator","Individually wrapped; thaw at room temperature before eating — no cooking or preparation needed"]
rows.description:
Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter Frozen Sandwiches are premade, individually wrapped sandwiches suited for packed lunches, quick snacks, or on-the-go eating. This listing contains 24 sandwiches total: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter, each 2 oz.

The Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread variety combines creamy peanut butter with smooth, seedless raspberry spread. The Peanut Butter variety contains creamy peanut butter on its own. Both are made with soft bread baked in the USA.

All sandwiches are made with no artificial preservatives, no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Storage: Keep sandwiches frozen until ready to use. Thaw at room temperature before eating. Alternatively, refrigerate for up to five days — bread stays soft in the refrigerator. Do not microwave.

Keep sandwiches frozen. Thaw before eating.

rows.title: Uncrustables Frozen Peanut Butter Sandwiches Variety Pack – Raspberry Spread and Apple Cinnamon Jelly Protein, 24 Count
rows.bullets: ["Contains 24 individually wrapped frozen peanut butter sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Apple Cinnamon Jelly Protein, each sealed for storage and portability.","Each sandwich is made with soft bread baked fresh in the USA, sealed on all sides with no crust. Bread contains no artificial preservatives.","Peanut Butter & Apple Cinnamon Jelly Protein sandwiches deliver 12g of protein per sandwich, with creamy peanut butter and apple cinnamon jelly filling.","Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches are filled with creamy peanut butter and seedless raspberry spread. Made with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.","Store in the freezer for longer shelf life. Refrigerate for same-day use — bread stays soft for up to five days in the fridge, so sandwiches are ready to eat without waiting.","Individually wrapped for easy portioning and lunchbox packing. No preparation required — thaw and eat."]
rows.description:
Uncrustables frozen sandwiches come pre-made and individually wrapped, removing the steps of bread-trimming and sandwich assembly from busy routines. This 24-count variety pack includes two flavors: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches and 12 Peanut Butter & Apple Cinnamon Jelly Protein sandwiches.

The Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches feature creamy peanut butter paired with seedless raspberry spread, enclosed in soft bread baked fresh in the USA. The bread contains no artificial preservatives, and both varieties are made with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

The Peanut Butter & Apple Cinnamon Jelly Protein sandwiches follow the same crust-free format with creamy peanut butter and apple cinnamon jelly, and each sandwich provides 12g of protein.

Both varieties store in the freezer for extended shelf life. For same-day use, refrigerate — the bread stays soft for up to five days in the refrigerator, so the sandwiches are ready to eat without thawing time. Each piece is individually wrapped for easy portioning and on-the-go use.

Individually wrapped for straightforward portioning and packing"]
rows.description:
Uncrustables frozen sandwiches come pre-made and individually wrapped, ready to thaw and eat. This listing contains 24 sandwiches total — 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Chocolate Flavored Hazelnut Spread — each weighing 2 oz.

The Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches combine creamy peanut butter and smooth, seedless raspberry spread in soft, crustless bread baked in the USA. The Chocolate Flavored Hazelnut Spread sandwiches contain a chocolate hazelnut filling in the same crustless bread format.

Both varieties are made with bread containing no artificial preservatives. Neither variety contains high fructose corn syrup, artificial sweeteners, or artificial colors or dyes.

To serve: thaw sandwiches before eating. Once removed from the freezer, sandwiches can be refrigerated — bread stays soft for up to five days under refrigeration. Keep in the freezer for longer-term storage.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread Frozen Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, 24 Count
rows.bullets: ["Pack contains 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches — 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread, each weighing 2 oz","Bread is baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives, no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Each sandwich features creamy peanut butter paired with sweet seedless fruit spread, sealed in soft crustless bread","Store in the freezer; refrigerate for up to five days once thawed — individually wrapped so sandwiches are easy to pull out one at a time","No cooking or assembly required — thaw at room temperature and serve, suitable for packed lunches, school days, or on-the-go eating"]
rows.description:
Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread sandwiches come in a 24-count variety pack — 12 of each flavor — offering two distinct berry options in a single order.

Each sandwich is made with soft bread baked fresh in the USA, sealed around a filling of creamy peanut butter and sweet seedless fruit spread, with the crusts removed. The bread contains no artificial preservatives, and the filling has no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Store sandwiches in the freezer for extended storage, or move them to the refrigerator where the bread stays soft for up to five days. Thaw at room temperature before eating — no cooking or preparation needed. Each sandwich is individually wrapped for easy portioning.

Each sandwich weighs 2 oz.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter Sandwiches Variety Pack, Raspberry Spread and Morning Protein Mixed Berry Spread, 2 oz Each, 24 Count, Frozen
rows.bullets: ["Pack contains 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread (2 oz each) and 12 Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread (2 oz each)","Each Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwich is made with soft crustless bread, creamy peanut butter, and sweet seedless raspberry spread — seedless filling, no crust","Each Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread sandwich pairs creamy peanut butter with mixed berry spread on soft, crustless bread baked with no artificial preservatives","Store in the freezer for longer-term storage; move to the refrigerator to thaw — bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated","Fillings contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes; bread baked fresh in the USA"]
rows.description:
This 24-count variety pack includes two Uncrustables flavors: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches and 12 Morning Protein Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread sandwiches, 2 oz each.

Both varieties feature soft, crustless bread sealed around creamy peanut butter. The Raspberry Spread variety adds sweet, seedless raspberry spread. The Morning Protein variety pairs the same peanut butter with mixed berry spread.

Each sandwich is individually wrapped. Store in the freezer for longer shelf life or transfer to the refrigerator to thaw — bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated. No preparation required beyond thawing.

Bread is baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives. Fillings contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter Sandwich Variety Pack, 24 Count – 12 Raspberry Spread & 12 Strawberry Jam, 2 oz Each, Frozen
rows.bullets: ["Contains 24 individually wrapped frozen peanut butter sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter and Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter and Strawberry Jam, each 2 oz","Crustless bread baked in the USA with no artificial preservatives; contains no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Each sandwich is filled with creamy peanut butter paired with either sweet seedless raspberry spread or smooth strawberry jam","Store in the freezer for extended use, or refrigerate once thawed; bread stays soft in the refrigerator for up to five days","Individually wrapped for portability – suited for school lunches, work bags, or on-the-go snacking"]
rows.description:
This pack contains 24 individually wrapped, frozen Smucker's Uncrustables peanut butter sandwiches – 12 Peanut Butter and Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter and Strawberry Jam, each 2 oz.

The bread is crustless and baked fresh in the USA. Each sandwich contains no artificial preservatives, no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes. The filling combines creamy peanut butter with either smooth, seedless raspberry spread or strawberry jam.

Sandwiches can be stored in the freezer for longer-term use. Once thawed, they can be refrigerated for up to five days – the bread stays soft during refrigeration. No heating or preparation is required.

Each sandwich is individually wrapped, making them straightforward to pack for school, work, travel, or any time a ready-to-eat option is needed.

rows.title: Uncrustables Frozen Sandwiches Variety Pack, Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly, 2 oz Each, 24 Count
rows.bullets: ["24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches — 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly, each 2 oz","Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread variety is made with soft crustless enriched white bread, creamy peanut butter, and smooth seedless raspberry spread","Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly variety uses crustless whole wheat bread with creamy peanut butter and grape jelly filling","Both varieties contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes; bread baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives","Store in the freezer for extended shelf life or refrigerate — bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated; no preparation required, thaw and eat"]
rows.description:
This pack contains 24 individually wrapped frozen Uncrustables sandwiches in two varieties: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly, each weighing 2 oz.

The Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches feature soft, crustless enriched white bread filled with creamy peanut butter and smooth, seedless raspberry spread. The Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly sandwiches use crustless whole wheat bread with creamy peanut butter and grape jelly. Both varieties are made without high fructose corn syrup, artificial sweeteners, artificial colors, or artificial dyes. Bread is baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives.

Each sandwich is individually wrapped and requires no preparation — thaw at room temperature or refrigerate overnight before eating. Refrigerated sandwiches stay soft for up to five days. For longer storage, keep in the freezer and thaw as needed.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter & Blueberry Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, Variety Pack, 24 Count, Frozen
rows.bullets: ["24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches included — 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Blueberry, each weighing 2 oz","Each sandwich is made with Unbeatably Soft Bread baked fresh in the USA — the bread contains no artificial preservatives and stays soft after thawing","Filled with creamy peanut butter alongside either seedless raspberry spread or sweet blueberry spread — no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Store in the freezer for long-term use; once moved to the refrigerator, sandwiches stay soft for up to five days — no heating or preparation needed before eating","Pre-assembled and individually wrapped — straightforward for packing in lunchboxes, bringing to work, or eating on the go"]
rows.description:
Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter & Blueberry Sandwiches are pre-assembled frozen sandwiches sold individually wrapped — thaw and eat, with no cooking or assembly required.

This pack contains 24 frozen sandwiches total: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Blueberry. Each sandwich weighs 2 oz and is made with Unbeatably Soft Bread baked fresh in the USA. The bread contains no artificial preservatives.

Fillings include creamy peanut butter paired with either seedless raspberry spread or sweet blueberry spread. Made with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Store in the freezer until ready to use. Once moved to the refrigerator, sandwiches remain soft for up to five days. Thaw at room temperature or refrigerate overnight — no heating required.

Each sandwich is sealed individually and packaged without crusts. A practical option for school lunches, workplace snacking, or portable meals on the go.

rows.title: Uncrustables - Peanut Butter Sandwich Variety Pack, Frozen, 2 oz Each, 24 Count, Raspberry Spread & Grape Jelly
rows.bullets: ["CONTAINS: 24 individually wrapped frozen Uncrustables sandwiches - 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly, each 2 oz","SOFT CRUSTLESS BREAD: Each sandwich is made with soft bread baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives, sealed at the edges for a clean, crust-free bite","TWO PEANUT BUTTER VARIETIES: One variety pairs creamy peanut butter with smooth, seedless raspberry spread; the other pairs creamy peanut butter with classic grape jelly","FLEXIBLE STORAGE: Keep sandwiches in the freezer for longer storage, or refrigerate - the bread stays soft for up to five days - and eat without any heating","NO ARTIFICIAL ADDITIVES: Made without high fructose corn syrup, artificial sweeteners, or artificial colors or dyes","INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED: Each sandwich is sealed in its own wrapper for easy portioning, packing, and on-the-go eating"]
rows.description:
This pack contains 24 individually wrapped Uncrustables frozen sandwiches split evenly between two varieties: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly, each 2 oz.

The bread is soft and crustless, baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives, and sealed at the edges to keep fillings in place. Store sandwiches in the freezer for extended shelf life, or move them to the refrigerator - the bread stays soft for up to five days. No heating required.

Both varieties are made without high fructose corn syrup, artificial sweeteners, or artificial colors or dyes. Each sandwich arrives in its own individual wrapper for easy portioning and on-the-go use.

Contents: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread sandwiches and 12 Peanut Butter & Grape Jelly sandwiches, 2 oz each, 24 sandwiches total.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread Frozen Sandwiches, 2 oz Each, 24 Count
rows.bullets: ["Pack of 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches in two flavors — 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread, each sandwich weighing 2 oz","Crustless bread baked fresh in the USA — soft texture with no artificial preservatives","Filled with creamy peanut butter paired with sweet seedless raspberry spread or mixed berry spread — no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Refrigerator friendly — sandwiches can be moved from the freezer to the refrigerator, where the bread stays soft for up to five days; thaw at room temperature before eating","Individually wrapped and pre-made — no preparation required before packing for school lunches, work, or travel"]
rows.description:
This pack contains 24 individually wrapped Uncrustables frozen sandwiches in two flavors: Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter & Mixed Berry Spread, with 12 sandwiches of each flavor.

Each sandwich weighs 2 oz and features soft, crustless bread baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives. Fillings pair creamy peanut butter with either seedless raspberry spread or mixed berry spread. The sandwiches contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Store in the freezer for extended shelf life. To thaw ahead of time, move sandwiches to the refrigerator — the bread stays soft for up to five days. Thaw at room temperature before eating.

Each sandwich is individually wrapped, making them straightforward to pack for school lunches, work, or travel with no preparation required.

rows.title: Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread Sandwiches, 24 Count, 2 oz Each, Frozen
rows.bullets: ["24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches, 2 oz each: 12 Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread and 12 Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread","Each sandwich features soft bread baked in the USA with no artificial preservatives, no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes","Filled with creamy peanut butter and either smooth seedless raspberry spread or chocolate flavored spread; crusts removed","Store in the freezer for longer shelf life, or move to the refrigerator where bread stays soft for up to five days","Individually wrapped for easy packing in lunchboxes, bags, or coolers; thaw at room temperature or in the refrigerator before serving"]
rows.description:
This 24-count variety pack contains Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Raspberry Spread Sandwiches and Uncrustables Peanut Butter & Chocolate Flavored Spread Sandwiches, 12 of each variety, 2 oz per sandwich, shipped frozen.

Each sandwich features soft bread baked in the USA and sealed around creamy peanut butter paired with either smooth seedless raspberry spread or chocolate flavored spread. Crusts are removed.

These sandwiches contain no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.

Store in the freezer for longer storage, or move to the refrigerator. The bread stays soft for up to five days when refrigerated. Each sandwich is individually wrapped for easy packing in lunchboxes, bags, or coolers. Thaw at room temperature or in the refrigerator before serving.

rows.title: Uncrustables Frozen Sandwiches Variety Pack, 24 Count – Peanut Butter & Honey Spread and Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam
rows.bullets: ["Contains 24 individually wrapped frozen sandwiches — 12 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread on soft wheat bread and 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam on whole wheat bread.","Peanut Butter & Honey Spread variety features creamy peanut butter and smooth honey spread on soft wheat bread, with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes.","Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam variety is made with whole wheat bread, creamy peanut butter, and strawberry jam — the same crustless format in a whole grain option.","Store in the freezer; thaw at room temperature for 30 to 60 minutes before eating, or refrigerate and use within five days — bread stays soft either way.","Each sandwich is pre-made and individually wrapped, with no preparation required beyond thawing — a practical option for lunchboxes, after-school snacks, or quick meals on the go."]
rows.description:
This 24-count variety pack contains two flavors of Smucker's Uncrustables frozen sandwiches: 12 Peanut Butter & Honey Spread and 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam, all individually wrapped and ready to thaw.

Peanut Butter & Honey Spread sandwiches are made with soft wheat bread, creamy peanut butter, and smooth honey spread. Made with no high fructose corn syrup, no artificial sweeteners, and no artificial colors or dyes. Bread is baked fresh in the USA with no artificial preservatives.

Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam sandwiches feature whole wheat bread with creamy peanut butter and strawberry jam — a whole grain take on the crustless sandwich format, with no crust and no prep required.

Store sandwiches in the freezer until ready to eat. Thaw at room temperature for 30 to 60 minutes, or move to the refrigerator and use within five days — bread stays soft when refrigerated. No cooking or preparation required. Each sandwich is pre-made and individually wrapped.

This pack contains 24 individually wrapped Uncrustables frozen sandwiches in two varieties: 12 Whole Wheat Peanut Butter & Strawberry Jam and 12 Peanut Butter & Blackberry Spread.
